description.value:
[1 action] Archetype, Concentrate, Fire

You compress your fist into a mass of superheated flame and hurl it forward. Make a ranged Strike (range 30 feet) using your unarmed attack bonus. This Strike deals fire damage equal to your normal unarmed damage plus an additional 1d8 fire damage.

Critical Hit: The target gains persistent fire damage 1d6.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
